category_sources: source_facts.description says terminal emulator and BBS client; official homepage describes Qodem as a serial communications package supporting telnet, rlogin, ssh, sockets, and command lines.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses Qodem; source_facts.name is qodem.
docs_sources: Official homepage, getting started guide, and man page provide user documentation.
repo_sources: Official Qodem homepage says its development code repository is on Codeberg; official man page gives https://codeberg.org/AutumnMeowMeow/qodem.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes terminal emulation, BBS usage, serial/modem, telnet, rlogin, ssh, raw sockets, and curses-based operation.
